title: Shirjeel's Optimized
description: One of The Best optimization modpack for Minecraft designed to enhance performance and improve gameplay experience.
body:
Shirjeel's Optimized

Shirjeel’s Optimized is the ultimate FPS-friendly modpack designed for smooth and powerful gameplay on SMP servers. Whether you're PvPing, building, or exploring — this modpack keeps your game running clean, fast, and beautiful.

## 🚀 Features
- Boosted FPS with Sodium, Lithium, and other performance mods
- Beautiful visuals with shader support
- Lightweight and lag-free for low-end PCs
- 100% SMP-friendly
- Tested & featured by **ShirjeelPlays**

## 📦 Installation
Use Prism Launcher, Modrinth App, or MultiMC to import the `.mrpack` or Modrinth `.zip` file.

## 🛑 Content Creators – Please Credit
If you use this in a video, please:
- Include the official Modrinth link
- Mention the name “Shirjeel’s Optimized”
- Give proper credit to support the project 🙏

---
🎮 Happy Crafting from ShirjeelPlays!
